title: Imbued Gear
description: Addon for Amethyst Imbuement that brings new Armor, Weapons, Trinkets, and Materials!
body:
![Main Title Header for Imbued Gear](https://i.imgur.com/hq8cVey.png) Welcome to Imbued Gear! This mod is an equipment Addon to my main mod, [Amethyst Imbuement](https://modrinth.com/mod/amethyst-imbuement). Craft powerful end-game armors, weapons and trinkets. Loot strange artifacts from chests around the world, and combine everything together to benefit from powerful Set Bonuses! All of these items integrate well with Amethyst Imbuement's spell casting, providing various bonuses to spells besides normal player bonuses. In game documentation is powered by Patchouli, and is simply a new Chapter in Amethyst Imbuement's Glistering Tome

[![Bisect Hosting Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/85a7141b-76c9-4f0c-bd04-21f4b0d56c4a.webp "Bisect Hosting Banner")](https://bisecthosting.com/fzzyhmstrs)   ![Armor Sets Banner](https://i.imgur.com/8V6oCHn.png) Central to the mod are 9 brand new, powerful armor sets. These sets are all crafted in the Imbuing Table with pre-existing and new ingredients to form armor sets with unique focuses and abilities. Sets have bonuses when worn together with their supporting weapons, providing bonuses such as: * Increased Health, Attack Damage, Movement Speed, and bonuses to other vanilla Minecraft attributes * Increased spell power, with bonuses to Spell Damage, effect duration and amplification, and so on. * Unique named set effects, such Void Strike, which has a chance to provide massively increased damage to targets that are cursed. * And much  more! Below is a grid with all the armors laid out. Check out their set bonuses in the gallery! ![Grid of Armor Set Items](https://i.imgur.com/qrelpp2.png) As mentioned, all of these sets come with unique set effects. Here's an example of one! ![Example Set Bonus Tooltip](https://i.imgur.com/Dwulogy.png) ![Weapons and Trinkets Banner](https://i.imgur.com/KzHImKW.png) Pair powerful and unique weapons and trinkets with your armor to complete the set bonuses and unlock their full potential! These items are focused on providing very unique innate or acitve abilities to make your play experience as interesting as possible * Love Katana's? The Crackling Spellblade is just that, and more! It is a scepter-blade with a powerful innate spell, Bankai, that teleports you through enemies in front of you, cutting them down as you pass. * No warrior is complete without their Axe! The might Warriors Axe can rend the flesh of your enemies, critically striking them. It can be charged up to guarantee this strike, too. * Aspirations of a darker kind? Look no further than the sinister Nihil Blade, sapping the very lifeforce from your foes as you strike them. * Like casting spells, but wish you could also cosplay as a gatling gun? Find the glassy Living Flame to give you temporary massive reductions to spell cooldowns. * Like your Summons, but wish they didn't die so fast? Maybe the Strange Timepiece with it's innate spell duration boost can help you out! * A Tier 4 scepter to raise your spellcasting to new heights! * And so much more!! Here are just some examples of the weapons and trinkets added! ![Example grid of Weapon and Trinket Items](https://i.imgur.com/7KWFuhl.png) _This mod if for Fabric. A Forge version is not planned._ _Modpack developers please feel free to include this mod! If you need help with quests, recipe tweaks, or whatever else you may need, please reach out._ _Please leave any issues you have in the comments or on the Github issue tracker._
